Bash(__NEW_LINE_735c81992ec46dd7__ python3 << 'EOF'
import re
import os
from pathlib import Path
from collections import defaultdict

# Root directory
root_dir = r"D:\\02_Development\\Skills\\_master-skills"

# Dictionary to store: slug -> list of \(path, name\)
slug_map = defaultdict\(list\)

# Walk through all categories
for category_dir in Path\(root_dir\).iterdir\(\):
    if not category_dir.is_dir\(\):
        continue
    
    # Walk through all skill directories in the category
    for skill_dir in category_dir.iterdir\(\):
        if not skill_dir.is_dir\(\):
            continue
        
        skill_file = skill_dir / "SKILL.md"
        if not skill_file.exists\(\):
            continue
        
        try:
            with open\(skill_file, 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
                content = f.read\(\)
            
            # Extract name from frontmatter
            # Look for name: field in YAML frontmatter between --- markers
            match = re.search\(r'^---\\s*\\n\(.*?\)\\n---', content, re.DOTALL\)
            if not match:
                # Try without leading --- 
                match = re.search\(r'^\(.*?\)\\n---', content, re.DOTALL\)
            
            if match:
                frontmatter = match.group\(1\)
                name_match = re.search\(r'name:\\s*\([^\\n]+\)', frontmatter\)
                if name_match:
                    name = name_match.group\(1\).strip\(\)
                    # Generate slug
                    slug = re.sub\(r'[^a-z0-9]+', '-', name.lower\(\)\).strip\('-'\)
                    
                    # Store relative path for cleaner display
                    rel_path = str\(skill_dir.relative_to\(root_dir\)\)
                    slug_map[slug].append\(\(rel_path, name\)\)
                else:
                    print\(f"Warning: No name field in {skill_dir}"\)
            else:
                print\(f"Warning: No frontmatter in {skill_dir}"\)
        except Exception as e:
            print\(f"Error reading {skill_file}: {e}"\)

# Find collisions
collisions = {slug: entries for slug, entries in slug_map.items\(\) if len\(entries\) > 1}

print\(f"Total master skills: {sum\(len\(v\) for v in slug_map.values\(\)\)}"\)
print\(f"Unique slugs: {len\(slug_map\)}"\)
print\(f"Number of collisions: {len\(collisions\)}"\)
print\(\)

if collisions:
    print\("SLUG COLLISIONS FOUND:"\)
    print\("=" * 80\)
    
    for i, \(slug, entries\) in enumerate\(sorted\(collisions.items\(\)\), 1\):
        print\(f"\\n{i}. Slug: '{slug}'"\)
        for path, name in entries:
            print\(f"   - {path}"\)
            print\(f"     Name: {name}"\)
else:
    print\("No slug collisions found!"\)

EOF)

from collections import defaultdict

# Root directory

# Dictionary to store: slug -> list of \(path, name\)
slug_map = defaultdict\(list\)

# Walk through all categories
for category_dir in Path\(root_dir\).iterdir\(\):
    if not category_dir.is_dir\(\):
        continue
    
    # Walk through all skill directories in the category
    for skill_dir in category_dir.iterdir\(\):

            continue
        
        skill_file = skill_dir / "SKILL.md"
        if not skill_file.exists\(\):
            continue
        
        try:
            with open\(skill_file, 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
                content = f.read\(\)
            
            # Extract name from frontmatter
            # Look for name: field in YAML frontmatter between --- markers
            match = re.search\(r'^---\\s*\\n\(.*?\)\\n---', content, re.DOTALL\)
            if not match:
                # Try without leading --- 
                match = re.search\(r'^\(.*?\)\\n---', content, re.DOTALL\)
            
            if match:
                frontmatter = match.group\(1\)
                name_match = re.search\(r'name:\\s*\([^\\n]+\)', frontmatter\)
                if name_match:
                    name = name_match.group\(1\).strip\(\)
                    # Generate slug
                    slug = re.sub\(r'[^a-z0-9]+', '-', name.lower\(\)\).strip\('-'\)
                    
                    # Store relative path for cleaner display

                    slug_map[slug].append\(\(rel_path, name\)\)
                else:

            else:
                print\(f"Warning: No frontmatter in {skill_dir}"\)
        except Exception as e:

# Find collisions

print\(f"Total master skills: {sum\(len\(v\) for v in slug_map.values\(\)\)}"\)

print\(\)

if collisions:
    print\("SLUG COLLISIONS FOUND:"\)
    print\("=" * 80\)
    
    for i, \(slug, entries\) in enumerate\(sorted\(collisions.items\(\)\), 1\):
        print\(f"\\n{i}. Slug: '{slug}'"\)
        for path, name in entries:
            print\(f"   - {path}"\)
            print\(f"     Name: {name}"\)
else:
    print\("No slug collisions found!"\)
